summary: Iteration 6 frontend refinement verified end-to-end. All 50+ assertions passed including new ingredient blocks, WhySalvix pillars, footer-as-contact migration, Navbar 'Why' link, and updated Artist Program copy. Backend smoke (POST /api/artist-applications) returns 201.

backend_smoke.POST /api/artist-applications: 201 Created, response includes id + persisted fields

critical_code_review_comments: Salvix.jsx: ingredient-* test IDs are derived via `ing.name.toLowerCase().replace(/\s/g, '-')` — works for current 4 names. If a future ingredient contains punctuation/diacritics, IDs may break; consider an explicit `testId` field on each ingredient like ArtistProgram fields use.
Footer.jsx wraps id='contact' on the <footer> element; smooth-scroll from Navbar works correctly. No issues.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_iter6 artist application via backend smoke (id=d8565f6f-3477-481f-9470-298df5050f13). Safe to leave or main agent can purge TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 fully passing. Contact role now lives in the footer (data-testid=site-footer, id=contact). The deleted Contact.jsx is no longer rendered. Mocked: REACT_APP_FORMSPREE_ENDPOINT remains unset — form submissions only persist to backend (intentional). New IDs added/verified: ingredient-snail-mucin, ingredient-ectoin, ingredient-panthenol, ingredient-peptides, why-section, pillar-0..3, nav-why.
